hooks.command: if [ -d .git ] && ! grep -q 'pre-commit' .git/hooks/pre-commit 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"This project uses pre-commit hooks (clang-format for C++, black for Python, jupytext sync for notebooks). They are not installed in this clone. Before the user makes any commit, suggest they run: pre-commit install"}}\n'; fi
